subcodes.first_line: O true friend! The prime requisite of love is that one give up one’s life for the Beloved, becoming an enamored wanderer infamous to the peoples of the world
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوست حقیقی شرط محبت آنست که انسان جان فدای جانان نماید و سرگشته و سوداای
subcodes.subjects: @pain of love; love as veil, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @love of God, @prayer for spiritual recognition
